auth.talentSubtitle: Sign in to continue to your matches.
auth.hrSubtitle: Sign in to your company account.
auth.hmSubtitle: Sign in to your hiring manager account.
auth.reauthSubtitle: For security, please re-enter your password to access the admin console.
auth.createSubtitleTalent: Find your next role through curated AI matches.
auth.createSubtitleHr: Set up your HR admin account to start receiving AI-matched talent.
auth.createSubtitleHm: Find and hire top talent through AI-powered matching.
auth.byContinuing: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.byContinuingTail: and consent to AI-powered compatibility analysis of your data.
auth.checkEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to
auth.checkEmailFinish: Open it on this device to finish signing in.
auth.checkEmailSpam: Can't find it? Check your spam or junk folder.
auth.errorBody: We couldn't complete sign-in. Please try again.
auth.tryAgainHint: If this keeps happening, clear your browser cache for this site and retry.
auth.signInTimeout: Sign-in timed out — please refresh the page and try again.

landing.title: Which side are you on?
landing.subtitle: Pick one. We'll take it from there.
landing.talentDesc: Looking for a role. Get three curated offers — no applications.
landing.hiringDesc: Looking for talent. Three curated candidates — no résumé pile.

consent.title: Data Processing Consent and Waiver
consent.subtitle: We need your explicit consent before we can match you. Please read carefully.
consent.agreeLabel: I have read and agree to the consent and waiver above.

referral.title: Invite a friend, earn points
referral.subtitle: Share your code. When they finish onboarding, you get {{points}} points.

points.redeem: Redeem {{cost}} pts for 1 free extra match
points.title: Your points wallet
points.subtitle: Earn points by engaging with the platform. Redeem them for extra matches.
points.ruleRejectMatch: Reject a proposed match and explain why (each)
points.ruleAcceptMatch: Accept a match and attend the interview
points.ruleEndReview: Submit an end-to-end review after your journey
points.ruleReferral: A friend joins using your referral link
points.ruleReferred: You joined via a friend's referral link
points.noTransactionsHint: Start earning by engaging with your matches.

consult.title: Book a private career consult
consult.subtitle: Talk through your direction with a senior advisor. Pick the depth that fits your moment.

tierDesc.quick: A short read on your current direction — best for a single, focused question.
tierDesc.standard: Enough time to walk through your situation and get tailored, actionable next steps.
tierDesc.deep: Full session — covers career direction, timing windows, and a 6–12 month plan.

consult.footnote: Sessions run on a private 1-on-1 video call. After payment you'll receive your unique link by email.
consult.paid: Payment received — your session is confirmed.
consult.willEmail: We'll email you the video link shortly. If you don't see it within a few minutes, check spam.
consult.pendingConfirm: We haven't received the payment confirmation yet. This page will update once it arrives — usually within a minute.
consult.couldNotConfirm: We couldn't confirm your booking. Please contact support if payment was deducted.
consult.couldNotStart: Could not start payment. Please try again.

data.title: Data requests
data.intro: Exercise your rights under Malaysia's PDPA 2010. See the
data.introTail: for context. We respond within 21 days.
data.typeAccess: Access — send me a copy of my data

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp updates
whatsapp.optIn: Send me match updates on WhatsApp

cashier.selectOrderHint: Pick an open order from the list to collect payment.

shifts.tipPoolHint: Splits the shift's tip total by hours worked + tables served.
